description: Create 4 new infrastructure packages: packages/analytics (event tracking, funnel analysis, A/B testing, cohort analysis, attribution modeling), packages/notifications (push, in-app, email, scheduling, grouping), packages/search (full-text inverted index, BM25 ranking, autocomplete, faceted search), packages/media (image/video/audio processing, transcoding, CDN, chunked uploads, metadata extraction)
steps: Create packages/analytics/src/types.ts - All analytics types: Event, PageView, FunnelStep, CohortDefinition, ABTest, AttributionModel, etc.
Create packages/analytics/src/core/event-tracker.ts - EventTracker class with track(), pageView(), click(), scroll(), timeSpent() methods, event queue, batch processing
Create packages/analytics/src/core/funnel-analyzer.ts - FunnelAnalyzer class: defineFunnel(), trackStep(), getConversionRate(), getDropoff(), getAverageDuration()
Create packages/analytics/src/core/ab-testing.ts - ABTestingEngine class: createExperiment(), assignVariant(), trackConversion(), calculateSignificance() with chi-square test
Create packages/analytics/src/core/cohort-analyzer.ts - CohortAnalyzer class: defineCohort(), addUser(), getRetention(), compareCoorts(), getCohortMetrics()
Create packages/analytics/src/core/attribution.ts - AttributionEngine class: firstTouch(), lastTouch(), linear(), timeDecay(), positionBased(), customModel()
Create packages/analytics/src/core/realtime-dashboard.ts - RealtimeDashboard class: getCurrentUsers(), getActiveEvents(), getMetricsSnapshot(), subscribeToUpdates()
Create packages/analytics/src/index.ts - Barrel export all analytics modules
Create packages/notifications/src/types.ts - NotificationType, NotificationPriority, DeliveryChannel, NotificationPreferences, etc.
Create packages/notifications/src/services/push-service.ts - PushNotificationService: send(), sendBulk(), registerDevice(), unregisterDevice() with FCM/APNs abstraction
Create packages/notifications/src/services/in-app-service.ts - InAppNotificationService: create(), markRead(), markAllRead(), getUnread(), getHistory(), groupByType()
Create packages/notifications/src/services/email-digest-service.ts - EmailDigestService: queueForDigest(), buildDigest(), sendDigest(), setDigestFrequency()
Create packages/notifications/src/services/scheduler-service.ts - SchedulerService: schedule(), cancel(), reschedule(), getScheduled(), processQueue()
Create packages/notifications/src/services/preference-service.ts - PreferenceService: getPreferences(), updatePreferences(), getChannelsForEvent(), shouldNotify()
Create packages/notifications/src/index.ts - Barrel export all notification modules
Create packages/search/src/types.ts - SearchQuery, SearchResult, SearchFilter, FacetDefinition, IndexDocument, SearchSuggestion, etc.
Create packages/search/src/core/inverted-index.ts - InvertedIndex class: addDocument(), removeDocument(), search(), tokenize(), normalize(), getTermFrequency()
Create packages/search/src/core/bm25-ranker.ts - BM25Ranker class: score(), rank(), calculateIDF(), calculateTF(), setParams() with k1, b tuning
Create packages/search/src/core/autocomplete.ts - AutocompleteEngine class: suggest(), addToIndex(), fuzzyMatch(), editDistance(), getPopular(), getTrending()
Create packages/search/src/core/faceted-search.ts - FacetedSearch class: addFacet(), applyFilters(), getFacetCounts(), buildFilterTree(), combineFacets()
Create packages/search/src/core/search-analytics.ts - SearchAnalytics class: trackQuery(), getPopularQueries(), getZeroResults(), getClickthrough(), getSuggestionRate()
Create packages/search/src/index.ts - Barrel export all search modules
Create packages/media/src/types.ts - MediaType, ProcessingOptions, TranscodeProfile, ImageFilter, UploadChunk, MediaMetadata, CDNConfig, etc.
Create packages/media/src/services/image-processor.ts - ImageProcessor class: resize(), crop(), filter(), watermark(), compress(), contentAwareCrop(), generateThumbnail()
Create packages/media/src/services/video-transcoder.ts - VideoTranscoder class: transcode(), generateHLS(), generateDASH(), extractFrames(), getResolutions(), estimateDuration()
Create packages/media/src/services/audio-processor.ts - AudioProcessor class: normalize(), trim(), applyEffects(), generateWaveform(), extractMetadata(), convertFormat()
Create packages/media/src/services/upload-manager.ts - UploadManager class: initChunkedUpload(), uploadChunk(), completeUpload(), resumeUpload(), getProgress(), cancelUpload()
Create packages/media/src/services/cdn-service.ts - CDNService class: generateUrl(), signUrl(), invalidateCache(), getOptimalEdge(), buildResponsiveSet()
Create packages/media/src/services/metadata-extractor.ts - MetadataExtractor class: extractExif(), getDimensions(), getDuration(), getCodecInfo(), getGPSLocation()
Create packages/media/src/index.ts - Barrel export all media modules
acceptance_criteria: packages/analytics/src/index.ts exists with exports for EventTracker, FunnelAnalyzer, ABTestingEngine, CohortAnalyzer, AttributionEngine, RealtimeDashboard
packages/notifications/src/index.ts exists with exports for PushNotificationService, InAppNotificationService, EmailDigestService, SchedulerService, PreferenceService
packages/search/src/index.ts exists with exports for InvertedIndex, BM25Ranker, AutocompleteEngine, FacetedSearch, SearchAnalytics
packages/media/src/index.ts exists with exports for ImageProcessor, VideoTranscoder, AudioProcessor, UploadManager, CDNService, MetadataExtractor
Each source file has 200-400 lines of real TypeScript implementation with full business logic
All types files have comprehensive interface definitions with proper TypeScript generics
All classes use proper async/await patterns and error handling
verification: Run: node scripts/test.js - should pass without errors and show increased file/export count
Check that all 4 new packages have src/index.ts barrel exports
findings: All 4 packages created with 30 implementation files totaling 11,191 lines. Test passes (732 total TS files, 2139 exports). Node requires NODE_OPTIONS='' to avoid preload module error. All core implementations include real algorithms: chi-square significance testing, Porter stemming, BM25 ranking, Levenshtein distance, Haversine formula, time-decay attribution.
